latest_review_note: Bi-weekly review — added RSK-009 for regulatory change, updated RSK-003 mitigation status

risks.title: Data Migration Integrity Loss During ERP Cutover
risks.description: Migration of 4.7M records across 23 entity types carries risk of data corruption, orphaned foreign keys, or silent truncation during the ETL pipeline. Historical data from the legacy system uses inconsistent encoding and date formats.
risks.trigger: Data validation failures during dry-run migration exceeding 0.1% error threshold
risks.mitigation: Running bi-weekly dry-run migrations with automated reconciliation checks. Built checksum validation at row level for all financial entities. Engaging third-party data quality consultant for April validation sprint.
risks.contingency: Abort cutover and revert to legacy system using pre-migration snapshot; extend parallel-run period by 30 days

risks.title: Key Vendor Delivery Delay on Custom Integration Module
risks.description: The warehouse management integration module from Nexova Systems is tracking 3 weeks behind the contracted delivery date. Nexova has cited resource constraints and a dependency on their own platform upgrade.
risks.trigger: Nexova misses revised delivery date of March 28, 2026
risks.mitigation: Weekly status calls with Nexova project manager escalated to executive sponsor level. Contractual penalty clause activated for delays beyond 4 weeks. Internal team has begun scoping a minimal viable integration as a fallback.
risks.contingency: Deploy minimal viable integration built in-house; defer advanced warehouse analytics features to Phase 2

risks.title: Insufficient User Adoption Due to Change Resistance
risks.description: Finance and operations teams have used the legacy ERP for 11 years. Early feedback from pilot group indicates significant resistance to new workflows, particularly in accounts payable and inventory management modules.
risks.trigger: Pilot group adoption rate falls below 60% after 2-week evaluation period
risks.mitigation: Expanded training program from 2 days to 5 days with role-specific tracks. Appointed change champions in each department. Created video walkthrough library for top 20 daily workflows. Weekly office hours with the implementation team.
risks.contingency: Extend parallel-run period; deploy simplified UI configuration for resistant teams; escalate to division heads for mandate

risks.title: Infrastructure Capacity Insufficient for Peak Load Testing
risks.description: Performance testing environment currently provisioned at 40% of projected production capacity. Full-scale load testing requires additional database nodes and compute resources that are pending procurement approval.
risks.trigger: Procurement approval not received by March 14, 2026
risks.mitigation: Submitted expedited procurement request on February 24 with VP sponsorship. Running scaled-down performance tests in parallel to identify bottlenecks early.
risks.contingency: Use production environment during off-hours for final load test with controlled traffic simulation

risks.title: Regulatory Compliance Gap in New Chart of Accounts
risks.description: The new chart of accounts structure must comply with updated IFRS 17 reporting requirements effective January 2027. The current mapping was designed against IFRS 16 and may require structural changes.
risks.trigger: External audit advisory identifies non-compliant account mappings during Q2 review
risks.mitigation: Engaged Deloitte advisory team to review chart of accounts against IFRS 17 draft requirements. Building account structure with extensibility for regulatory changes.
risks.contingency: Implement IFRS 17 account mappings as a post-launch configuration update before January 2027 effective date

risks.title: Knowledge Loss from Legacy System Expert Departing
risks.description: Henrik Solberg, the primary legacy ERP administrator with 9 years of institutional knowledge, has announced retirement effective June 30, 2026. His departure creates a knowledge gap for legacy system operations during the parallel-run period.
risks.trigger: Henrik's departure before knowledge transfer completion
risks.mitigation: Structured knowledge transfer sessions scheduled twice weekly through June. Henrik is documenting all custom configurations, undocumented business rules, and support procedures in the project wiki. Two team members assigned as knowledge transfer recipients.
risks.contingency: Retain Henrik as part-time consultant for 3 months post-retirement; engage legacy vendor professional services for emergency support

risks.title: Integration Testing Window Compressed by Upstream Delays
risks.description: Cumulative delays in API development and the vendor integration module have compressed the integration testing window from 6 weeks to approximately 3.5 weeks. This increases the risk of undiscovered integration defects in production.
risks.trigger: Integration test phase start date slips past April 14, 2026
risks.mitigation: Prioritizing critical path integration scenarios for early testing. Running contract tests in parallel with development to catch interface mismatches sooner.
risks.contingency: Accept reduced test coverage for lower-risk integration paths; implement enhanced production monitoring with automatic rollback triggers

risks.title: Budget Overrun from Unplanned Consulting Engagement
risks.description: The addition of Deloitte advisory services and the potential in-house fallback integration development were not in the original budget. Current projections show a potential 8% budget overrun.
risks.trigger: Actual spend exceeds 105% of approved budget
risks.mitigation: Reallocating underspend from deferred Phase 2 features. Submitted change request for additional $120K contingency budget.
risks.contingency: Defer non-critical Phase 1 features to reduce consulting scope; negotiate payment terms with Deloitte

closed_risks:
1. *RSK-009 (Closed March 1):* Single sign-on compatibility with new ERP — resolved after vendor confirmed SAML 2.0 support in February patch release
2. *RSK-010 (Closed February 18):* Network bandwidth insufficient for data migration bulk transfers — resolved with dedicated migration VLAN provisioned by infrastructure team
